name: Stuffed Mushrooms#4
recipeInstructions:
1 Cook the chicken in boiling salted water until tender. Drain, reserving broth.
2 Remove the skin and bones from the chicken and dice the meat finely.
3 Rinse and dry the mushrooms.
4 Remove the stems from the mushrooms and finely chop them. Reserve these stems.
5 Sprinkle the mushroom caps with lemon juice.
6 Melt butter in a pan and add the reserved mushroom stems and garlic. Cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7 Add 2 to 3 tablespoons of the reserved chicken broth and chopped parsley. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8 Add the diced chicken and lightly beaten egg yolk to the mixture. Mix well.
9 Spoon the stuffing into each mushroom cap.
10 Arrange the stuffed mushrooms on a lightly greased baking sheet and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
11 Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
12 Serve hot.
